selection.status_reason: Live thesis monitor refreshed the active weekly pick.

reasons: Price trend remains constructive: 5-day momentum is 1.3% and 20-day momentum is 8.7%.
Trend quality is supported by 60% positive sessions over the last 10 trading days and the price sitting 3.5% relative to its 20-day average.
Risk profile shows daily volatility around 1.4%, downside volatility near 1.0%, and a recent max drawdown of 4.1%.
Volume confirmation is -8.1% versus the trailing baseline, which helps separate steady breakouts from thin momentum.
Relative strength is 1.5% versus SPY over 5 days and -1.7% versus the sector ETF.
No recent relevant news passed the filter, so the news layer stayed neutral and contributed less confidence.
Recent V company-news coverage was mostly broad market roundups or weakly direct mentions, so the company-news contribution was forced back to neutral.
Technical weights were calibrated on 2303 historical symbol-weeks against 5-day excess return (IC 0.01).
Overall model score is 0.030 with low confidence.
